allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('single total:', d['meta']['total']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('9-5 total:', d['meta']['total']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('11 total:', d['meta']['total']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); item=d['items'][0]; print\(json.dumps\(item, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); item=d['items'][0]; print\(json.dumps\(item.get\('variantPreview',{}\), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); paths=d.get\('paths',{}\); [print\(p, json.dumps\(paths[p].get\('get',{}\).get\('parameters',[]\), ensure_ascii=False\)\) for p in paths if 'catalog/cards' in p]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/swagger.json'\)\); paths=d.get\('paths',{}\); [print\(p\) for p in paths]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('array material:', d['meta']['total']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('single leather:', d['meta']['total']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('single satin:', d['meta']['total']\)")
